analysis.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
analysis.summary: DELLON是Ondo发行的代币化股票，追踪DELL股价。近期价格小幅上涨2.24%，但链上存在同名Meme币（Dell/SOL），市值仅2160美元，流动性极低。需警惕混淆风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 若官方Ondo代币DELLON在主流DEX有足够流动性且与DELL股价挂钩，则逻辑可能改变。

catalysts: DELL股价上涨带动代币价格
Ondo平台新增流动性或上线CEX

latestNews.title: What is Dell Technologies(DELLON) Coin: everything you need to know, how to buy, and what to watch - WEEX
Dell Technologies (DELLON) Price Prediction (June 2026): Forecast, Technical Levels, and RWA Token Outlook - WEEX
Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized) Price: DELLON/USD Live Price Chart, Market Cap & News Today - CoinGecko
Dell Technologies Tokenized Stock (Ondo) price today, DELLon to USD live price, marketcap and chart - CoinMarketCap

fundamentals: DELLON是Ondo Finance发行的代币化股票，1:1锚定DELL股价
总供应量42.33枚，市值约1.8万美元，流动性极低
链上存在同名Meme币（Dell/SOL），市值仅2160美元，24h交易量5.76美元
官方Ondo代币仅在Ondo平台交易，链上DEX无真实流动性
marketRead: CoinGecko数据显示DELLON 24h涨幅2.24%，但交易量仅16万美元，流动性差
链上Dell/SOL Meme币24h交易量仅5.76美元，几乎无交易
市场关注度极低，仅3人关注
risks: 同名Meme币混淆风险，投资者可能误买
官方代币流动性极低，买卖价差大，难以成交
代币化股票受限于Ondo平台，非美国用户需KYC
项目方合约风险（Ondo为知名项目，风险较低）
watchlist: Ondo官方是否增加DELLON在Uniswap等DEX的流动性
RWA赛道整体资金流入情况
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinGecko、DexScreener，链上Meme币数据可靠性低
官方DELLON代币链上流动性数据缺失，需通过Ondo平台验证

profile.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
profile.description: DELLon is the Ondo Tokenized version of Dell Technologies Inc, giving tokenholders economic exposure similar to holding DELL and reinvesting any dividends. Ondo tokenized stocks enable non-US retail and institutional users around the world to instantly mint and redeem tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs, 24 hours a day, five days a week with full access to traditional exchange liquidity. Additional restrictions apply. Learn more at ondo.finance/global-markets.
